fixes_applied: Patched test.sh python tail (V043_PY block) to remove P2P_REGRESSION from hard_zero loop. Same root cause as hyperswitch-8295 -- on the v0.4.3.1 stragglers list.
notes: Re-extracted with PR #8198 (15 files, +868/-113) per brief. 8 F2P gates covering V2 PI/PA apply_changeset, V2 UniqueConstraints, ungated KV imports, V2 insert_payment_intent + update_payment_intent KV branches, V2 /:id/kv merchant_account route, V2 PartitionKey variant.
All F2P checks use multi-signal AND patterns (e.g., `RedisKv && kv_wrapper && PartitionKey:: && TypedSql && no todo!`) -- robust against partial/decorative patches.
Pre-fix bug: P2P_REGRESSION failure (cargo_metadata_workspace, rust_files_nonempty) zeroed the reward. Post-fix: matches v0.4.3.1 standard.
Sum of F2P weights = 1.00. Bash inner reward subsumed by V043_PY weights -- no double-counting.
